summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DevGrill AI Interview Platform after NestJS migration. Backend APIs working correctly with 83.3% success rate. Frontend fully functional with excellent UI/UX. Critical issue: Gemini API quota exceeded preventing AI question generation and evaluation.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 due to Gemini API quota exceeded (20 requests/day limit reached)
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks core AI interview functionality - question generation fails
critical_bugs.details: All Gemini models exhausted: gemini-2.5-flash (20/day), gemini-2.5-pro (0/day), gemini-2.0-flash (0/day)

critical_bugs.issue: Cannot test due to dependency on question generation
critical_bugs.details: Depends on successful question generation to get round_id

integration_issues.issue: Question generation fails due to backend AI quota limits

passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct branding and navigation
Setup page with all configuration options (category, tech stack, difficulty, questions, timer)
Session creation and redirection to interview room
Report page displaying session details and scores
Bookmark system (structure working, depends on AI for content)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all pages load, only AI-dependent features affected)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Gemini API quota exceeded. Need to either: 1) Upgrade Gemini API plan to increase quota limits, 2) Implement API key rotation, 3) Add fallback AI service, or 4) Mock AI responses for testing. All core interview functionality (question generation, answer evaluation) is blocked.
